meaning: 阿姆利则[印度北部城市](锡克教圣地)
examples: The train departed Amritsar at 6.15 p.m.
Flights to Melbourne, Amritsar and eventually London are on the way.
A man adjusts lights reading Merry Christmas at st Paul's church in Amritsar on December 24, 2010.
Doctors carrying out an autopsy in Amritsar found that his heart, kidneys and stomach were missing.
For Amritsar, a once-thriving city dominated by Sikhs, renewed trade could drive an economic revival.
